result.stdout:
Description:
  Generate TypeScript hub client

Usage:
  TypeScriptHubGenerator [options]

Options:
  -f, --assembly-path <assembly-path> (REQUIRED)  Path to the assembly to generate the typescript for
  -o, --output-folder <output-folder> (REQUIRED)  Path to the output folder
  --create-react-context                          Generate react context and hook
  --version                                       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                  Show help and usage information
